TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Don_Barksdale, title = Don_Barksdale, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Don_Barksdale} }

S.FORM: Don Barksdale nilacul Don Barksdale, u tatama, nalecuh ciniza i Oakland kakitizaan, California. nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput. nalecuhan ciniza i 3 a bulad 31 a demiad, 1923 a mihcaan. u miunduay. mapatay ciniza i 1993 a mihcaan.
S.PHON: don barksdar~ɾə nir~ɾaʦur~ɾ don barksdar~ɾə, u tatama, nar~ɾəʦuħ ʦiniza i oakr~ɾand kakitizaan, ʦar~ɾifornia. nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput. nar~ɾəʦuħan ʦiniza i * a bur~ɾad ** a dəmiad, **** a miħʦaan. u miunduaj. mapataj ʦiniza i **** a miħʦaan.
S.FORM: Don Barksdale nilacul Don Barksdale, u tatama, nalecuh ciniza i Oakland kakitizaan, California. nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput. nalecuhan ciniza i 3 a bulad 31 a demiad, 1923 a mihcaan. u miunduay. mapatay ciniza i 1993 a mihcaan.
